rationale: The cited paper appears conceptually close to the citing paper’s core construct of product complementarity/joint use: it provides experimental evidence on selective sensitization to complementary foods and perceived complementarity as a mechanism. Given the citing paper’s focus on combinatory recommendations and compatibility effects, this citation could plausibly serve as a theory/mechanism source rather than a purely incidental mention. With only DOI-level match and no in-text snippet, it is not safe to drop as obvious mention-only.
